form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 350m. Last start failed to finish the race over 350m at this track on April 5. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.90) when sixth over 450m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from seven starts. Can hit the frame with the right run.
